notes.summary: Metals are shiny, malleable, and good conductors of heat and electricity, while non-metals are dull, brittle, and poor conductors.
notes.importance: Understanding the properties of metals and non-metals is crucial in various industries such as construction, electronics, and manufacturing.
quick_facts: Metals are typically found on the left side of the periodic table
Non-metals are found on the right side of the periodic table
Metals are often used in construction due to their strength and durability

notes.summary: Metals have several distinct properties, including being shiny, malleable, and good conductors of heat and electricity.
notes.importance: Understanding the properties of metals is essential for their application in various industries.
quick_facts: Metals are often shiny due to their metallic luster
Metals can be molded into different shapes without breaking
Metals are excellent conductors of heat and electricity

notes.summary: Metals have a wide range of applications, including construction, electronics, and manufacturing.
notes.importance: The uses of metals are vast and diverse, making them an essential part of modern life.
quick_facts: Metals are used in construction to build buildings and bridges
Metals are used in electronics to make devices such as smartphones and laptops
Metals are used in manufacturing to produce machinery and equipment

notes.summary: Non-metals have distinct properties, including being dull, brittle, and poor conductors.
notes.importance: Understanding the properties of non-metals is crucial for their application in various industries.
quick_facts: Non-metals are often dull due to their non-metallic luster
Non-metals are brittle and break easily

notes.summary: Non-metals have a range of applications, including in the production of fertilizers, pesticides, and other chemicals.
notes.importance: The uses of non-metals are diverse and essential for modern life.
quick_facts: Non-metals are used to produce fertilizers
Non-metals are used to make pesticides
Non-metals have applications in the production of plastics
